s
olympics-2026-downloads-by-btiha
Line graph of one media object, itemized by sub-component (BTIH), as peer swarms over time, from week 1 to week 26. The y-xis is the number of downloaders in millions. The x-axis is the week number of the sample, starting at 1 and ending at or before 26.
